calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgment Due To Default Of Defendant Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Barbara Cray, Esq. of the Law Offices of Barbara Cray, T:650.654.2729, for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance by defendant, or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF TRINITY, A DIVISION OF BANK OF THE WEST's Motion For Entry Of Judgment Due To Default Of Defendant Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment is GRANTED. Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment in its favor and against defendant Daniel Miller in the amount of $62,886. No opposition filed.

ORDER and JUDGMENT were signed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Christine Jordan, CSR#12262, email: cjordan@sftc.org.
